articles.title: EXPLORING AI IN YOUR SOFTWARE BUILDING?
building better AI applications
articles.summary: 🧑🏫 Automated testing for LLMOps on DeepLearning.AI [6] [Free course]

articles.title: CHATGPT NOW USES ALL PAST CONVERSATIONS
articles.summary: ChatGPT can now remember all your past conversations, a step toward more personalized and long-term useful AI systems.

articles.title: MIRA MURATI'S STARTUP AIMS FOR $2B ROUND
articles.summary: Ex-OpenAI execs have joined Mira Murati's new startup, which is targeting a $2B raise despite having no product yet, banking on its star team and ambitious AI goals.

articles.title: AMAZON'S HEAVY AI INVESTMENT
articles.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy, in their annual letter, emphasizes that massive AI investment is essential to reinvent customer experiences, with over 1,000 GenAI projects underway and growing infrastructure demands.

articles.title: OMNICAPTIONER
articles.summary: OmniCaptioner is a unified visual captioning framework capable of generating detailed textual descriptions across diverse visual domains, including natural images, textual visuals, and structured graphics. It enhances visual reasoning with LLMs, improves image generation tasks, and enables efficient supervised fine-tuning with less data.

articles.title: BROWSECOMP AGENT BENCHMARK
articles.summary: OpenAI has released a new agent based benchmark that tests an agent's ability to locate hard-to-find information via actions in the browser. Its DeepResearch system/model gets 51%, whereas humans get around 80%.

articles.title: NEURAL MOTION SIMULATOR FOR EMBODIED AI
articles.summary: MoSim introduces a world model for motion dynamics that improves skill acquisition and enables zero-shot learning, effectively turning model-free RL into model-based.

articles.title: VIDEOCHAT R1
articles.summary: An inference time compute captioning method for video question answering. It uses RL to improve the overall reasoning of the model which leads to a 30% boost in object tracking tasks.

articles.title: CONCEPT ATTENTION
articles.summary: A novel method to view concepts in the attention map of neural networks.

articles.title: MAMMAL POSE ESTIMATION
articles.summary: KITPose is a novel keypoints-interactive model designed for general mammal pose estimation.

articles.title: OUR VISION FOR ACCELERATING CREATIVITY AND PRODUCTIVITY WITH AGENTIC AI
articles.summary: Adobe is integrating agentic AI across its product suite, including Acrobat, Photoshop, and Premiere Pro, to enhance creativity and productivity by automating repetitive tasks and providing smart recommendations. Agentic AI aims to empower users at all levels by allowing them to focus more on creative endeavors and less on technical execution. This approach will help streamline workflows, enabling professionals to achieve more with their tools.

articles.title: US ENGINEERS' AI CONVERTS SIMPLE TEXT INTO WALKING ROBOTS IN A DAY
articles.summary: Duke University's Text2Robot enables non-experts to create functional 3D robots from simple text inputs using a generative AI framework. This technology democratizes robotic design by eliminating complex barriers previously requiring extensive technical knowledge.

articles.title: ANNOUNCING THE AGENT2AGENT PROTOCOL (A2A)
articles.summary: Aiming to advance AI collaboration and automation in enterprise environments, Google Cloud has launched the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol to enable seamless interoperability between AI agents across different platforms and vendors, with support from over 50 tech partners including Atlassian, Salesforce, and PayPal. A2A provides a standardized framework for secure communication and task coordination among agents, enhancing productivity and reducing costs for enterprises. The open-source protocol also supports varied modalities and long-running tasks.

articles.title: SCULPTOR: CATCH AND FIX ISSUES AS YOU CODE
articles.summary: Sculptor is an early access coding agent environment that embeds software engineering best practices by running code in sandboxed environments.

articles.title: WORDPRESS AI WEBSITE BUILDER
articles.summary: A new AI website builder creates complete WordPress sites from user input, ideal for entrepreneurs, freelancers, and bloggers.

articles.title: TRUMP ADMINISTRATION BACKS OFF NVIDIA'S H20 CHIP CRACKDOWN
articles.summary: The Trump administration reversed plans to restrict Nvidia's H20 AI chip exports to China after Nvidia CEO promised U.S. investments.
